title: Cards To Images
summary: Render approved card packages through deterministic or recoverable generative backends into inspected platform images and a delivery manifest.
user_needs: turn approved card copy into real PNG or JPG files
render Xiaohongshu, WeChat, or Zhihu Idea card images
inspect every card image before upload
recover external image generation into the local card pipeline
produce a cards manifest for local delivery or optional public URLs
